prestazioni: Engine: 3.5L V6 Twin-Turbo (V35A-FTS) – Full forced-induction upgrade with Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (106mm billet compressor wheels, 76mm turbine wheels, 1.32 A/R turbine housings) paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe featuring a 304-grade merge collector and 3.5-inch V-band clamps for optimized exhaust flow. Supporting mods include a PTP Turbo Blanket (V35A-FTS-specific) and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can system with -10AN fittings to manage crankcase pressure under sustained boost (target: 28-30 psi on E85).

Fuel System: Full Radium Engineering port-injection conversion (V35A-FTS-specific) with dual Radium 260LPH fuel pumps (staged via AEM 340024 fuel pressure regulator), Injector Dynamics ID1700x port injectors, and a Fore Innovations F2i-1000 fuel surge tank. The OEM direct-injection system is retained but recalibrated via a Cobb Accessport (V35A-FTS-specific) with a custom E85 flex-fuel map (AFR target: 11.5:1 under full load).

Suspension & Drivetrain: Full Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (J300-specific valving, 24-position rebound/compression damping) with custom 10mm front and 15mm rear spring perches for aggressive stance. Drivetrain reinforcement includes a Cusco 2-way LSD (3.727 final drive ratio) for the rear axle, paired with a Peloquin front differential (40% lockup) and a custom 3.5-inch aluminum driveshaft with CV-style joints (replacing the OEM 2-piece unit). Chassis bracing includes a Cusco front strut tower bar (J300-specific) and a custom rear subframe brace fabricated from 4130 chromoly.
estetica: Widebody Conversion: Rocket Bunny J300 Pandem kit (PANDEM-J300-01) with extended carbon fiber fenders (3.5-inch front, 4.5-inch rear), custom aluminum inner fender liners, and relocated OEM crash beams. The kit includes a 3D-scanned carbon fiber front bumper with integrated tow hooks and a rear diffuser with dual 4-inch exhaust cutouts (for a custom dual-exit setup).

Aerodynamics: Full Veilside Fortune III-inspired aero package, including a custom carbon fiber hood with a 2.5-inch scoop (ducted to the Garrett intercoolers), side skirts with integrated LED turn signals (Osram LEDriving SL 120), and a rear wing (Veilside VS-03, 1,200mm width) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals with adjustable angle (0-15 degrees). Underbody, a custom 5mm aluminum belly pan with integrated heat shielding (DEI Titanium) protects the turbochargers and exhaust.

Lighting & Details: Full OEM+ lighting retrofit with Morimoto XB LED headlights (D2S projector housings, 5,500K color temp), custom C-West J300-specific taillights (sequential LED turn signals, smoked lenses), and a custom front grille delete (replaced with a 3D-printed carbon fiber mesh, 3mm pitch). Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (20x10.5 +15 front, 20x12 +25 rear) with custom center caps (TOYOTA script in red) and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/40/20 front, 315/35/20 rear).
